title: bidens nobilioides
intro: Bidens nobilioides, also known as hairy beggar-ticks or tickseed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bidens nobilioides include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Bidens nobilioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and to alleviate various health conditions.
